title: Enable win podman-machine test failure
body:
Intended to serve as motivation to fix them.  Removed from status
aggregator so the failures don't block PR merging.  Updated comment text
to reference related open issue, #20548.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

comments.body: Re-drafting this.  After discussing with @mheon he suggested making the test red, but removing from the `Total Success` status aggregator.  Making that change now...
LGTM. This is going to suck but let's tear off the band-aid and stop Windows regressions
@cevich quick work!  I don't think this addresses #20843 however .. is that something that can be included in this PR so we can work on both WSL and HyperV?
https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6103111505281024 is still green despite test errors in the log so I do not think this is working as interned?
...poke applied.  I g2g though, so I'll check on it later.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Oof, so #20857 is going to need more work.  I made it a separate PR in case this PR risks holding back the high-priority #20691 (since it depends on this one)
